title: OmniAthlete: Strength Training for Speed
description: This webinar focuses on the critical connection between strength training and speed development in athletic performance. Participants will gain insights into periodization strategies, exercise selection, and training progressions that optimize speed outcomes through targeted strength interventions.
synopsis: Join this comprehensive webinar exploring the relationship between strength training and speed development. Learn evidence-based approaches to designing strength programs that maximize speed performance across various sports. Expert practitioners will share practical strategies for implementing effective training methodologies.

title: FIBO 2026 — Global Fitness & Wellness
description: World's leading fitness and wellness trade show. Key platform for recovery technology, wearables, strength & conditioning equipment, and sports nutrition brands.

title: World Football Summit
description: World Football Summit is the premier annual event for football industry professionals, featuring keynote presentations, panel discussions, and networking opportunities. The summit focuses on innovation in football technology, digital transformation, fan experience, and business development across the global football ecosystem.
synopsis: The World Football Summit brings together football industry leaders, technology innovators, and business executives to explore the future of football through digital transformation, fan engagement, and commercial opportunities in the global sports market.

title: PEAK 2026 — Global Home of SportsTech
description: The premier SportsTech gathering: 1,000+ founders, sports executives, investors, and innovators. Live Tech Expo, expert-led sessions, and immersive networking. The industry's defining annual event.

title: StadiumBusiness Summit 2026
description: The venue and stadium industry's premier executive summit covering smart stadium technology, connectivity, commercial optimisation, and spectator experience.

title: SEAT Conference 2026
description: Sports, Entertainment and Alliance of Technology. The intersection of sports business and technology — venue ops, fan experience, data analytics, and digital transformation.

title: Soccerex Global 2026
description: The global football business summit — commercial deals, emerging markets, player data, broadcast innovation, and the future of football technology.

title: Golf Business Technology Conference 2026
description: Connecting golf industry executives with technology innovators. Covers golf performance analytics, course management technology, fan engagement, and retail.

title: SportsPro Investment Summit 2026
description: Sports finance and investment gathering covering private equity, deal flow, valuation, and emerging technology investment opportunities across global sport.

title: Sport Performance Summit London 2026
description: 300+ high performance leaders from across 40+ sports. Covers leadership, innovation, psychology, and technology in elite sport. Membership-based attendance — for those in elite sport performance leadership roles.

title: Leaders Week London 2026
description: 3,000+ senior executives from global sport business at Stamford Bridge. New campus-style experience with forums, think tanks, masterclasses, awards and experiential events. Sportsbusiness's flagship annual gathering.

title: Football Fitness Federation Conference 2026
description: The Football Fitness Conference brings together professionals in football training, conditioning, and performance. The event focuses on the latest developments in football-specific fitness, strength and conditioning methodologies, and athlete development strategies.

title: Soccerex Europe 2026
description: Soccerex Europe is the continent's leading football business conference and exhibition, connecting stakeholders across the European football ecosystem. The event features strategic sessions on commercial growth, technology innovation, fan engagement, and market development. Industry leaders share insights on digital transformation, sustainability initiatives, and emerging opportunities shaping the future of European football business.
synopsis: Europe's premier football business event bringing together industry leaders, clubs, federations, and technology providers. Three days of networking, exhibitions, and insights covering commercial opportunities, digital transformation, and the future of football across European markets.

title: Leaders Sports Awards 2026
description: An evening of connection, celebration and sport business excellence held at the iconic Café Royal in Central London. The awards recognize standout talent and innovation shaping the future of the sports industry across 8 categories and the esteemed Leaders Under 40 Award, celebrating the dedication that propels the sports industry forward year-round.
synopsis: The Leaders Sports Awards celebrate exceptional individuals and organizations driving global sport forward. Featuring eight categories plus the prestigious Leaders Under 40 Award, this black tie gala recognizes 365-day commitment to elevating sport across innovation, business excellence, and industry leadership.

title: TGG Live
description: TGG Live is Europe's leading football performance and technology conference, held at Chelsea FC's Stamford Bridge. The event connects performance directors, sports scientists, analysts, medical staff, coaches and technology providers for two days of knowledge sharing, networking and innovation showcase across all aspects of elite football performance.
synopsis: TGG Live is the premier European football performance and technology conference bringing together performance staff, coaches, and technology providers. The two-day event features keynote presentations, panel discussions, exhibition hall, and networking opportunities focused on the latest innovations in sports science, medical, nutrition, analysis, and coaching within professional football.

title: CASES 2026 - Bridging Knowledge, Building Futures: Sport and Exercise Science Reimagined
description: CASES 2026 presents a revamped combined student and professional conference at Manchester Metropolitan University, featuring comprehensive programming with world-leading insights across sport and exercise science disciplines. The event offers keynote presentations, workshops, symposia, research presentations, networking opportunities, and brand new awards recognizing outstanding research and practice. Attendees can earn CPD credits while engaging with leading researchers, practitioners, and the sports business industry.
synopsis: CASES 2026 is a combined student and professional conference featuring world-leading sport and exercise science expertise. The two-day event includes 20+ plenary sessions, keynotes, workshops, oral and poster presentations, networking opportunities, and practical sessions at Manchester Metropolitan University.

title: Sports Investment Forum
description: A premier gathering for sports investment professionals, featuring insights into market trends, funding opportunities, and innovative technologies shaping the sports industry. The forum provides a platform for meaningful connections between investors and sports-tech entrepreneurs while showcasing breakthrough innovations in performance analytics, fan engagement, and sports infrastructure.
synopsis: The Sports Investment Forum brings together investors, entrepreneurs, and industry leaders to explore investment opportunities in sports technology, infrastructure, and innovation. Features keynote presentations, panel discussions, networking sessions, and startup pitches focused on the future of sports business and emerging technologies.

title: MEDICA 2026 - World Forum for Medicine
description: MEDICA is recognized as the world's premier medical trade fair, held annually in Düsseldorf, Germany. The event features comprehensive exhibitions covering medical technology, laboratory equipment, diagnostics, physiotherapy, and digital health innovations. It provides an essential platform for healthcare professionals to discover the latest medical advancements, attend educational forums, and network with industry leaders from around the globe.
synopsis: MEDICA is the world's largest medical trade fair, bringing together healthcare professionals, medical technology companies, and researchers. The event showcases cutting-edge medical devices, digital health solutions, laboratory technology, and diagnostics. With over 5,000 exhibitors from 70+ countries, it serves as a global platform for innovation, networking, and knowledge exchange in the medical industry.

title: 1080 Motion Sports Technology Webinar
description: This webinar by 1080 Motion will showcase the latest advancements in sports performance technology and training solutions. Attendees will learn about innovative methodologies for enhancing athletic performance through data-driven insights and technological integration. The session is designed for sports professionals, coaches, and performance specialists interested in optimizing training outcomes.
synopsis: Join 1080 Motion for an educational webinar exploring the latest developments in sports performance technology and training methodologies. This session will cover innovative approaches to athletic development, performance monitoring, and data-driven training solutions. Discover how cutting-edge technology is transforming modern sports training and athlete preparation across various disciplines and performance levels.

title: International Extreme Sports Medicine Congress 2026
description: The International Extreme Sports Medicine Congress 2026 is a comprehensive three-day event focusing on the latest advances in medical care for extreme sports athletes. The congress covers topics including altitude medicine, wilderness emergency care, sports injury prevention, and performance enhancement in challenging environments. Attendees will benefit from expert presentations, hands-on workshops, and networking opportunities with leading professionals in the field.
synopsis: Premier international congress bringing together medical professionals, researchers, and practitioners specializing in extreme sports medicine. Features cutting-edge research presentations, clinical case studies, injury prevention strategies, and performance optimization techniques for high-risk sports athletes and adventure medicine practitioners.
sponsor: University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus

title: International Sports Surgery and Medicine Conference Glasgow 2026
description: The International Sports Surgery and Medicine Conference Glasgow 2026 is organized by the Royal College of Physicians and Surgeons of Glasgow, providing a comprehensive educational platform for sports medicine practitioners. The conference covers cutting-edge surgical techniques, injury prevention strategies, rehabilitation protocols, and performance optimization methods. Attendees will benefit from multidisciplinary perspectives on sports medicine challenges and innovative solutions from leading international experts.
synopsis: Premier international conference bringing together sports medicine professionals, surgeons, and researchers to share latest advances in sports injury prevention, treatment, and rehabilitation. Features world-class speakers, interactive workshops, and networking opportunities for healthcare professionals working in elite and recreational sports.

title: SportsPro Live London
description: SportsPro Live London serves as the definitive gathering for sports business professionals, featuring two days of intensive programming covering the latest trends in sports technology, data analytics, and commercial innovation. The conference attracts C-level executives, technology providers, and industry thought leaders from across the global sports ecosystem. Attendees gain insights into emerging technologies, network with key decision-makers, and explore partnership opportunities that drive the future of sports business.
synopsis: SportsPro Live London is the premier sports business conference bringing together industry leaders, innovators, and decision-makers. The event features keynote speakers, panel discussions, networking opportunities, and showcases of cutting-edge sports technology solutions across performance analytics, fan engagement, and commercial operations.

title: Isokinetic Conference
description: The Isokinetic Conference is a leading international event focused on sports medicine, rehabilitation, and performance enhancement. The conference attracts physiotherapists, sports medicine doctors, researchers, and healthcare professionals from around the world. It features presentations on the latest research, clinical practices, and technological advances in sports medicine and injury prevention.
synopsis: Premier international conference bringing together sports medicine professionals, physiotherapists, and researchers. Features cutting-edge presentations on injury prevention, rehabilitation techniques, biomechanics, and performance optimization. Networking opportunities with leading experts in sports science and medical fields.

title: SEI Conference III
description: SEI Conference III is a premier gathering for sports technology professionals, featuring presentations on the latest developments in sports engineering, performance monitoring systems, and analytical tools. The conference provides a platform for knowledge sharing, networking, and collaboration between academia, industry, and sporting organizations to advance the field of sports technology.
synopsis: The third annual Sports Engineering Institute Conference brings together industry leaders, researchers, and practitioners to explore cutting-edge innovations in sports technology, performance analytics, and engineering solutions for elite and grassroots sports.

title: ISENC Conference 2026
description: ISENC's flagship annual conference provides a comprehensive platform for knowledge exchange in exercise science and nutritional conditioning. The event features world-class keynote speakers, peer-reviewed research presentations, practical workshops, and extensive networking opportunities. Attendees include researchers, sports scientists, nutritionists, coaches, and industry professionals committed to advancing evidence-based practice in sport and exercise.
synopsis: The International Society for Exercise and Nutritional Conditioning (ISENC) annual conference brings together leading researchers, practitioners, and industry professionals to explore cutting-edge developments in exercise science, sports nutrition, and performance optimization. Features keynote presentations, workshops, and networking opportunities for the global sports science community.

title: The International Conference on Injury and Illness Prevention in Sport
description: The International Conference on Injury and Illness Prevention in Sport is a premier academic and professional gathering that unites sports medicine experts, researchers, coaches, and healthcare practitioners. The conference showcases the latest scientific research, innovative prevention methodologies, and practical applications in reducing injury and illness rates among athletes. Attendees benefit from world-class keynote speakers, peer-reviewed research presentations, and collaborative networking sessions.
synopsis: Leading international conference bringing together researchers, practitioners, and clinicians to discuss cutting-edge approaches to injury and illness prevention in sport. Features keynote presentations, research papers, and networking opportunities focused on evidence-based prevention strategies across all sporting disciplines and performance levels.

title: Leaders in Sport Performance Institute
description: The Leaders in Sport Performance Institute is the definitive gathering for sports performance professionals, featuring insights into the latest technologies, methodologies, and best practices. The event showcases innovation in sports science, performance analytics, and athlete development strategies. Industry experts share real-world case studies and emerging trends shaping the future of sports performance.
synopsis: Premier sports technology and performance conference bringing together industry leaders, practitioners, and innovators to explore cutting-edge solutions in athlete performance, data analytics, and sports science applications across professional and elite sport.

title: SBJ Tech Week 2026
description: Sports Business Journal's Tech Week is the industry's leading conference for sports technology innovation and business development. The event features keynote presentations from major league executives, startup pitch competitions, interactive technology demonstrations, and extensive networking opportunities designed to drive partnerships between sports organizations and technology providers.
synopsis: SBJ Tech Week 2026 brings together sports business leaders, technology innovators, and industry experts for three days of networking, insights, and cutting-edge demonstrations. The premier event showcases the latest advancements in sports technology, from fan engagement platforms to performance analytics, connecting decision-makers across professional sports organizations with emerging tech solutions.

title: International Extreme Sports Medicine Congress 2026
description: The International Extreme Sports Medicine Congress 2026 is a comprehensive three-day event focusing on the latest advances in medical care for extreme sports athletes. The congress covers topics including altitude medicine, wilderness emergency care, sports injury prevention, and performance enhancement in challenging environments. Attendees will benefit from expert presentations, hands-on workshops, and networking opportunities with leading professionals in the field.
synopsis: Premier international congress bringing together medical professionals, researchers, and practitioners specializing in extreme sports medicine. Features cutting-edge research presentations, clinical case studies, injury prevention strategies, and performance optimization techniques for high-risk sports athletes and adventure medicine practitioners.
sponsor: University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus

title: ESSKA Congress 2024
description: ESSKA Congress is the premier European event for sports traumatology and knee surgery professionals. The conference covers cutting-edge surgical techniques, rehabilitation protocols, injury prevention strategies, and the latest research in arthroscopic procedures. Attendees benefit from expert-led sessions, interactive workshops, and networking opportunities with international leaders in sports medicine and orthopedic surgery.
synopsis: The European Society of Sports Traumatology, Knee Surgery and Arthroscopy (ESSKA) Congress brings together leading orthopedic surgeons, sports medicine specialists, and researchers to share the latest advances in knee surgery, arthroscopy, and sports injury treatment. Features scientific sessions, hands-on workshops, and innovative technology demonstrations focused on improving patient outcomes in sports medicine.

title: NSCA National Conference
description: The NSCA National Conference is the leading educational and networking event for strength and conditioning professionals worldwide. The conference features research presentations, hands-on workshops, technology demonstrations, and expert panels covering the latest developments in exercise science, performance optimization, and athlete development. Attendees gain access to continuing education credits while connecting with industry leaders and discovering innovative training methodologies.
synopsis: The premier annual conference for strength and conditioning professionals, featuring cutting-edge research presentations, practical sessions, and networking opportunities. Covers exercise science, performance training, injury prevention, and technology applications in athletic development across all sports and populations.

title: World Congress of Science and Medicine in Sport
description: The World Congress of Science and Medicine in Sport is the flagship event of the International Federation of Sports Medicine (FIMS), held every four years. This comprehensive congress showcases the latest scientific advances and practical applications in sports medicine, exercise science, and athlete health and performance.
synopsis: The premier global gathering for sports science and medicine professionals, featuring cutting-edge research presentations, workshops, and networking opportunities. Bringing together researchers, clinicians, and practitioners to advance knowledge in exercise physiology, biomechanics, sports psychology, and performance optimization across all sporting disciplines.

title: ACL Management Symposium
description: The ACL Management Symposium is a premier educational event for sports medicine professionals dedicated to advancing ACL injury care. Expert speakers will present the latest research on injury prevention, surgical innovations, rehabilitation best practices, and evidence-based return-to-sport protocols. The symposium provides practical insights for improving patient outcomes and reducing re-injury rates.
synopsis: A comprehensive symposium focused on anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury management, bringing together sports medicine professionals, physiotherapists, and researchers. The event covers prevention strategies, rehabilitation protocols, surgical techniques, and return-to-sport considerations for ACL injuries in athletic populations.

title: Female Athlete Health and Performance: Best of the best from WISC26
description: This conference highlights the best content from WISC26 specifically focused on female athlete health and performance. It provides a comprehensive overview of the latest research, best practices, and innovative approaches to supporting female athletes in achieving optimal health and performance outcomes.
synopsis: A specialized conference focusing on female athlete health and performance, featuring the best insights and research from WISC26. The event brings together experts to discuss the unique physiological and performance considerations for female athletes across various sports disciplines.

title: ALTIS Speed Summit 2026
description: The ALTIS Speed Summit brings together the world's leading experts in speed development for an intensive three-day conference. Attendees will learn from elite coaches, sports scientists, and performance specialists through presentations, workshops, and hands-on sessions covering biomechanics, training methodologies, and performance optimization.
synopsis: The premier gathering for speed development professionals featuring world-class coaches, sports scientists, and practitioners. Three days of cutting-edge presentations, practical workshops, and networking opportunities focused on maximizing athletic speed performance across all sports disciplines.

title: ALTIS Speed Summit 2026
description: The ALTIS Speed Summit brings together the world's leading experts in speed development for an intensive three-day conference. Attendees will learn from elite coaches, sports scientists, and performance specialists through presentations, workshops, and hands-on sessions covering biomechanics, training methodologies, and performance optimization.
synopsis: The premier gathering for speed development professionals featuring world-class coaches, sports scientists, and practitioners. Three days of cutting-edge presentations, practical workshops, and networking opportunities focused on maximizing athletic speed performance across all sports disciplines.

title: Sports Science Network Annual Conference 2026
description: Join leading sports scientists, performance analysts, and technology innovators for three days of knowledge sharing and professional development. The conference features keynote presentations from world-renowned experts, interactive workshops on the latest sports technology, and extensive networking opportunities with industry professionals from around the globe.
synopsis: The premier gathering for sports science professionals, featuring cutting-edge research presentations, technology demonstrations, and networking opportunities. Covers the latest advances in performance analysis, athlete monitoring, biomechanics, and sports technology innovations across elite and grassroots sports.

title: Irish Strength & Conditioning Conference 2026
description: The Irish Strength & Conditioning Conference is Ireland's leading professional development event for strength and conditioning practitioners, sports scientists, and fitness professionals. The conference features internationally renowned speakers presenting the latest research and practical applications in strength training, conditioning, and performance enhancement. Attendees will engage in evidence-based sessions, hands-on workshops, and valuable networking opportunities to advance their professional practice.
synopsis: Ireland's premier strength and conditioning conference bringing together international experts, researchers, and practitioners. Features cutting-edge research presentations, practical workshops, and networking opportunities for fitness professionals, coaches, and sports scientists seeking to advance their knowledge and practice.
